mapper.select: SELECT database_id as databaseId, session_phase as sessionPhase, session_progress as sessionProgress, autovacuum, elapsed_seconds as elapsedSeconds, heap_blks_total as heapBlksTotal, heap_blks_scanned as heapBlksScanned, heap_blks_vacuumed as heapBlksVacuumed, (heap_blks_total - heap_blks_scanned) as deadTupleTotal FROM vacuum_raw_metrics WHERE session_phase IS NOT NULL AND session_phase != 'completed' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT max_workers FROM vacuum_raw_metrics ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT active_workers FROM vacuum_raw_metrics ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
